| Column | Data                                                               |

| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                        |

error: median_tdigest just support numeric type, but got 'Null'

ast: median_tdigest(x_null)
evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                                            |
